title: Contact me - Pippa Heylings MP
text_excerpt: Contact me - Pippa Heylings MP Skip to main content Pippa Heylings MP About me Climate Champion My Campaigns News Contact me Volunteer for Pippa Heylings Newsletter Donate Join Donate Join My Campaigns Urgent petition to fix our roads Reverse Labour cuts to Holiday Food Vouchers Save palliative care beds at Arthur Rank Hospices Fix our local health services Protect our environment in South Cambs Urgent action on the cost of living Fairer Funding for Cambridgeshire GPs Contact me Privacy Policy Contact Pippa Heylings MP You can contact me at pippa.heylings.mp@parliament.uk If you are writing as a constituent, I will need to verify that you reside in the South Cambridgeshire parliamentary constituency in order to reply and deal with your case. Therefore please ensure that you have included your full name and home address in your email . As a newly elected MP, I am receiving a significant volume of emails whilst also setting up my office and staff. Therefore it is expected that the response time to your email will be greater than usual, and your patience in these first weeks is appreciated. You can read my Privacy Policy here Follow me on X (formerly Twitter) @pippaheylings You can also find me on Facebook , on Instagram or on Bluesky @pippaheylings.bsky.social The Liberal Democrats will use your contact details to send you information on the topics you have requested. Any data we gather will be used in accordance with our privacy policy at www.libdems.org.uk/privacy . To exercise your legal data rights, email: data.protection@libdems.org.uk . We take accessibility and your data privacy seriously. Read our accessibility statement and cookie policy . Promoted by the Liberal Democrats , First Floor, 66 Buckingham Gate, London SW1E 6AU. Website by Prater Raines . This website uses cookies Please select the types of cookies you want to allow. Essential These are necessary for the website to function properly. Analytics These help us to understand how our visitors use our website. Marketing These allow us to display content from other websites that track you for advertising purposes.
